Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. Remove all modern
businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing street-facing, fov 75
- commercial arterial road, 4-lane, asphalt
- sidewalks present, curbs present
- driveways: north driveway apron, south driveway apron; parking: open asphalt apron surrounding pump islands
- gas station canopy building at center lot over pump islands, 1 story, steel frame, corrugated metal fascia, flat roof, 30 feet from road setback
- service station office building at rear right corner, 1 story, concrete block, brick veneer, flat parapet roof, at parking apron setback
- open service bay building at rear left corner, 1 story, concrete block, gabled metal roof, at parking apron setback
- utilities: overhead power lines on wooden poles, transformer on northeast corner pole
- landscape: flat asphalt apron, painted concrete curbing, narrow grass strip at road edge
- immutable elements: canopy with four corner support posts, pump island with eight dispensers, north and south driveway aprons
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2025
Post-pandemic era. A 2025 fuel stop — LED canopy, full-color digital price sign, and a convenience store selling fresh food.

PERIOD DETAILS
- pay-at-pump screens with video ads
- free air and vacuum station at the lot edge
- price sign showing gas around $3.40
- main sign: an independent station sign in the style of QuikTrip
- window signs: 'HOT PIZZA SLICES $2.99', 'MEMBERS SAVE 10¢/GAL'
- stacked delivery boxes by the store door
- outdoor cafe barriers with planters by the coffee lane
Typography: minimalist geometric sans-serif, heavily simplified flat logos.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 6 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a driver self-serving at the pump
- a customer tapping a phone to pay at the pump
- a parent and kid sharing earbuds
Clothing: men in oversized fit tees, wide-leg pants; women in chunky dad sneakers, high-waisted wide-leg jeans. Fashion palette: sage green, beige, cream. No posing or eye contact.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 4 period vehicles, all different:
- 2022-2025 Toyota Tundra — massive grille, muscular stance — white
- 2022-2025 Nissan Pathfinder — squared-off three-row SUV — blue
- 2019-2025 Ram 1500 — crew cab pickup, large grille — dark green
- 2021-2025 Kia Carnival — boxy SUV-styled minivan — black
Parked with gaps; optionally 1 driving; no vehicle newer than 2025.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, high-visibility crosswalks
- utilities: overhead lines in older areas, underground in new developments, fiber optic widespread

TREES
- cottonwood tree at northeast corner of lot: maturing tree
- elm tree at sidewalk edge left of entrance: young tree, thin trunk
- cedar tree at back fence line: mature tree, large canopy

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — digital — smartphone or mirrorless camera look.
Color: high saturation. Grain: very clean, minimal to no noise.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 2022-2025 Toyota Tundra — massive grille, muscular stance
2019-2025 Ram 1500 — crew cab pickup, large grille
